parameters.name: list_events
parameters.description: List upcoming calendar events. Parameters: calendar_id (default 'primary'), time_min (ISO date), time_max (ISO date), max_results (default 10)

parameters.name: create_event
parameters.description: Create a new calendar event. Parameters: summary (title, required), start (ISO datetime, required), end (ISO datetime, required), description (optional), location (optional), calendar_id (default 'primary')

parameters.name: update_event
parameters.description: Update an existing calendar event. Parameters: event_id (required), summary (optional), start (optional), end (optional), description (optional), location (optional), calendar_id (default 'primary')

parameters.name: delete_event
parameters.description: Delete a calendar event. Parameters: event_id (required), calendar_id (default 'primary')

parameters.name: list_calendars
parameters.description: List all calendars accessible to the user.
